description: Claude Code tool permission preferences for the Pathways OI Trust project.

notes.general: When in doubt about whether something is allowed, prefer running it. The ask list is narrow and explicit. Everything else is allowed.
notes.rm: Free on build artifacts (dist/, node_modules/, *.tmp). Ask before deleting source files, migration files, or docs.
notes.database_migrations: Not applicable — I write SQL files, Phil applies them manually via Supabase dashboard.
notes.docker: Not used in this project. Flag if it ever comes up.
notes.sudo: Should never be needed. If I think I need it, something is wrong with the approach.
